title: Gooey Spicy British Chicken Wrap
description: A kid‑friendly, halal‑friendly wrap that blends classic British flavors with a spicy kick and a creamy, gooey finish.
instructions: Preheat a non‑stick skillet over medium heat.
Season the sliced chicken with garlic powder, smoked paprika, cayenne pepper, salt, and pepper.
Coat the chicken in flour, shaking off excess.
Add olive oil to the skillet and cook the chicken until golden and cooked through, about 6–7 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove the chicken and set aside, reserving the skillet juices.
In the same skillet, stir in shredded cheddar cheese and a tablespoon of the reserved pan juices until the cheese melts into a gooey coating.
Slice the cooked chicken into thin strips and return them to the skillet, mixing them with the melted cheese.
Warm the tortillas in a separate dry pan for 30 seconds on each side.
Spread a thin layer of Greek yogurt over each tortilla, top with the cheesy chicken, and spoon salsa over the chicken.
Fold the sides of the tortilla over the filling, roll tightly, and serve immediately.
